title: Sharkling Origin
description: An Origins datapack that adds a new shark themed origin
body:
This datapack adds an origin themed around sharks.

Heres a list with all of its abilities:

- Nautical Nature: You are adapted to live underwater, making so you can swim, mine and breath when submerged in water.
- Bite: You attack creatures with a powerful bite (Primary)
- Blood Frenzy: You go into a bestial rage that increase your strength and resistance
- Scales: You have a resilient layer of scales covering your body. (You have Natural Armor)
- Trident Master: You learned how to fight using tridents and can deal more damage when using them (3.5 to trident melee)
- Powerful Build: You are taller than most other creatures. (2.5 blocks tall)
- Dehydration: When you are outside the water you'll will dehydrate, becoming slower than usually and eventually dying
- Carnivore: You are unable to eat anything that's not meat
- Unskilled Fighter: Due to living underwater you never learned to wield swords, axes or bows and cant use them to fight
